options.responseData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: $('Build Response').first().json.ok, lead_id: $('Build Response').first().json.lead_id, appointment_id: $('Build Response').first().json.appointment_id, twilio_sid: $('Build Response').first().json.twilio_sid || null, error: $('Build Response').first().json.error || null }) }}

nodes.name: Recovery Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Body: { id } where id is the appointment_log row. Typically fired from clx-no-show-detector-v1's Execute Workflow node. Can also be called manually for edge-case recovery.

nodes.name: Twilio SMS Send
nodes.notes: TODO: (1) Create n8n credential named exactly `Twilio SMS` (Basic Auth: username=Account SID, password=Auth Token). (2) Replace TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID_PLACEHOLDER + TWILIO_SMS_NUMBER_PLACEHOLDER with real values (or expression-inject from env). (3) Bind this node to `Twilio SMS` credential. Until configured, node fails auth — workflow downstream logs NO_SHOW_SMS_FAILED.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ recovery_sms_sent_at: $json.twilio_ok ? new Date().toISOString() : null, recovery_sms_provider_ref: $json.twilio_sid || null, rebook_link: $json.rebook_link, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Compose SMS').first().json.lead_id, node_name: 'twilio_sms_send_failed', error_code: 'NO_SHOW_SMS_FAILED', error_message: ($('Parse Twilio Response').first().json.twilio_error || 'unknown').toString().slice(0, 500), severity: 'warning', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
